title: nasturtium divaricatum
intro: Nasturtium divaricatum, also known as tall watercress or California pepperwort, is a perennial aquatic plant native to the western coast of North America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The plant's leaves and stems contain compounds that have been shown to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Nasturtium divaricatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or salve, and is often used in natural remedies for skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
